name: Detailed Dina
background: Dina has been a birth doula for 8 years. She's supported over 100 families. She previously ran her own business (a café) so she's commercially minded and knows exactly what she wants. She has a clear brand identity, existing testimonials, and a booking system already set up. She's articulate and will often answer multiple questions in a single message.

quirks: sometimes gives more than was asked

seed_data.service_areas: Brighton, Hove, Lewes, Worthing, Shoreham, East Sussex
seed_data.birth_types: home birth, hospital, birth centre, VBAC, water birth
seed_data.additional_training: spinning babies, rebozo, trauma-informed care, aromatherapy for birth
seed_data.bio_previous_career: ran a café for 6 years before retraining
seed_data.bio_origin_story: had a transformative home birth with her second child and knew she wanted to support other women through that experience
seed_data.philosophy: evidence-based, informed choice, physiological birth where possible but no judgment
seed_data.client_perception: calm, prepared, makes you feel like you've got this
seed_data.signature_story: supported a first-time mum through a planned home birth that transferred to hospital — the mum later said having Dina there made the transfer feel safe rather than scary
seed_data.testimonials: Dina was incredible. She supported our home birth in Lewes and I genuinely don't know how we'd have managed without her. Her calm presence and preparation made all the difference. - Emma R.

will_elaborate_if: asked about anything — she's always willing
will_shut_down_if: asked a question she's already answered
treated as if she doesn't know what she wants
